title: CISA Adds Exploited Langflow and Trend Micro Apex One Vulnerabilities to KEV
description: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Thursday added two security flaws impacting Langflow and Trend Micro Apex One to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog, citing evidence of active exploitation. The vulnerabilities in question are listed below -   CVE-2025-34291 (CVSS score: 9.4) - An origin validation error vulnerability in Langflow that could
